ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
cdt_name:
- conda
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.9'

about.description:
SSp_Detector analyses raw EEG signals and extrapolates the number of sleep
spindles using either the absolute or relative Sigma power (11–16 Hz).
It accepts MNE Raw objects and automatically resamples recordings above
100 Hz to meet the processing requirement.
about.summary: Sleep spindles detector for EEG signals using absolute or relative Sigma power

commands: python -c "from SSp_Detector import spindles_abs, spindles_rel; print('OK')"

about.description:
SSp_Detector analyses raw EEG signals and extrapolates the number of sleep
spindles using either the absolute or relative Sigma power (11–16 Hz).
It accepts MNE Raw objects and automatically resamples recordings above
100 Hz to meet the processing requirement.
about.summary: Sleep spindles detector for EEG signals using absolute or relative Sigma power

commands: python -c "from SSp_Detector import spindles_abs, spindles_rel; print('OK')"

name: ssp_detector

raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "ssp_detector" %}
{% set version = "2026.3.30" %}
{% set python_min = "3.10" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/{{ name }}-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 305be37839ca22cc62ecbe983709c8bc26f2dbd003ba2962f9891ae6b8b063b5

build:
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-build-isolation
  number: 0

requirements:
  host:
    - pip
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - mne >=1.6.0
    - numpy >=1.25.0
    - outdated >=0.2.0
    - scipy >=1.12.0

test:
  requires:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
  imports:
    - SSp_Detector
    - SSp_Detector.ssp_detector
  commands:
    - python -c "from SSp_Detector import spindles_abs, spindles_rel; print('OK')"

about:
  home: https://github.com/sjg2203/SSp_Detector
  summary: Sleep spindles detector for EEG signals using absolute or relative Sigma power
  description: |
    SSp_Detector analyses raw EEG signals and extrapolates the number of sleep
    spindles using either the absolute or relative Sigma power (11–16 Hz).
    It accepts MNE Raw objects and automatically resamples recordings above
    100 Hz to meet the processing requirement.
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://github.com/sjg2203/SSp_Detector/blob/main/README.md
  dev_url: https://github.com/sjg2203/SSp_Detector

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - sjg2203
